GN[Tournament Game: FSTS Autumn 2015 Rumble (9993) R:4 (tym1101 vs jesultra)]
C[jesultra: Hi, I hope we can have a good game.
C[jesultra: Hi, I hope we can have a good game.
C[jesultra: It seems that ignoring S10 (move 18) may not have been an awesome idea.
jesultra: Thank you, too. This was an interesting game.
jesultra: After my failure on the right side, I thought it was over.
jesultra: However, then something went wrong for you on the left side, and it became even again.
jesultra: Even as my weak group managed to live at the bottom, I am not so certain it is over for you.
jesultra: If you had played at N2, I would be forced to respond at the bottom, leaving my embattled lower right corner even more vulnerable.
jesultra: I am worrying that it might die altogether.
jesultra: I am not sure about the variation on invading the knights enclosure corner, but it seems in dire straits to me.
jesultra: With such a large corner for you, the game would be even again.
